title: ConicArenas | Enhanced 2.0 Version
description: An Advanced Arena Reset & Management System, Added support for saving all storage blocks & nbt items.
body:
# ConicArenas
**An advanced arena reset & management plugin for Minecraft servers.**

ConicArenas provides a powerful way to manage and reset arenas automatically. It is designed for PvP servers, minigames, events, and any setup where arenas need to be refreshed after use. With flexible reset speeds, customizable borders, and performance-friendly features, ConicArenas keeps your arenas fair and ready at all times.

---

## 🎥 Previews

### Arena Creation
![Arena Create](https://i.postimg.cc/7LN2cGKk/2025-08-2814-36-12-ezgif-com-video-to-gif-converter.gif)

### Arena Reset
![Arena Reset](https://i.postimg.cc/3Rs00XR2/2025-08-2814-34-00-ezgif-com-video-to-gif-converter.gif)

---

## Features

- **Automatic Arena Reset**
  - Reset arenas after each match or round.
  - Supports both schematic-based resets and block regeneration.

- **Arena Borders**
  - Prevent players from leaving defined regions.
  - Choose between barriers, visual particle borders, or hybrid modes.

- **Reset Speed Options**
  - **Slow** → performance-safe block-by-block regeneration.
  - **Normal** → balanced for medium servers.
  - **Fast** → optimized quick resets.
  - **Extreme** → instant reset for high-performance setups.

- **Arena Management Tools**
  - Create, edit, delete, and list arenas with commands.
  - Auto-clear drops, entities, and leftover items.
  - Save multiple arena presets for different game types.

- **Performance Optimized**
  - Asynchronous operations to minimize lag.
  - Chunk-based reset handling.
  - Scales smoothly from small servers to large networks.

---

## Commands

All commands are under the base command `/arena`:

- `/arena create <name>` – Create a new arena  
- `/arena delete <name>` – Delete an arena  
- `/arena reset <name>` – Manually reset an arena  
- `/arena list` – View all arenas  
- `/arena border <name>` – Show/define arena borders  
- `/arena autoreset <name> <true|false>` – Toggle autoreset for an arena  
- `/arena reload` – Reload the configuration  

---

## Permissions

- `conicarena.*` – Access to all ConicArena commands and features  
- `conicarena.create` – Create arenas *(default: OP)*  
- `conicarena.delete` – Delete arenas *(default: OP)*  
- `conicarena.reset` – Reset arenas *(default: OP)*  
- `conicarena.list` – List arenas *(default: true)*  
- `conicarena.border` – Manage arena borders *(default: OP)*  
- `conicarena.autoreset` – Manage autoreset *(default: OP)*  
- `conicarena.reload` – Reload configuration *(default: OP)*  

---

## Example Configuration

### Arena Setup
<u>Install WorldEdit or FastAsyncWorldEdit</u>

### Customizable Reset Speeds
```yaml
reset-speeds:
  slow:
    delay: 10
    blocks-per-tick: 25
  normal:
    delay: 5
    blocks-per-tick: 50
  fast:
    delay: 2
    blocks-per-tick: 100
  extreme:
    delay: 1
    blocks-per-tick: 500
```

---

## Why ConicArenas?

- Keeps arenas **fair and fresh** automatically  
- Easy to configure, yet powerful for advanced setups  
- Flexible reset methods to fit your server’s needs  
- Lightweight and optimized for performance  

---

👉 Ideal for **PvP**, **minigames**, **events**, and **duel servers**.
